entry.title: Re: Can we set mandatory for attachments
entry.content: AnjaniAL, The entity typcically can only be edited from the Detail Form for the Entity. Is there another form that you are looking to prevent executing the entity edit from?

entry.title: F5104, Intercompany billing EDI
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I need help in configuration of the automatic posting for intercompany invoices via EDI.

Idoc failed with error message F5104 "vendor XXX ist not maintained in company zzz".

customizing in OBCA, OBCB, OBCC, OBCD, OBCE ist done.

Vendor ID in error message is the same as G/L-account in OBCB. 

Can anyone help to fix this?

Thanks in advance

Cornelia

entry.title: Re: Generate CAP Project in BAS with Error @sap/hdi-deplo...
entry.content: It was because @SAP/hdi-deploy didn't have version 5.4.2 published and cds-dk was trying to install that particular version. I see now that the version is published by @SAP/hdi-deploy in npm registry everything seems to be working.

entry.title: Re: IC Charging between Cost Centers with different currencies using SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Nikhil,

you are probably right, will test it. I just started with the combination where sender and receiver currency is the same, so Value in Local Currency could be simply used. For that I needed to check both sides and I stayed with the "logic". 😁

Thanks, Mathias

entry.title: Re: Error no accounts maintained for company code clearin...
entry.content: Customizing transaction is OBYA

entry.title: Re: SAP Integration Suite - How to execute POST using OData Adapter?
entry.content: Hi Pavan,

entry.title: how to make change request as rejected as there is no action
entry.content:
We have a typical situation.  We have a change request that has incident and normal change.  Incident is set to cancelled and Normal change is withdrawn. 

Now the status of Change request is in Release for approval.  But the approval status is in rejected status. At this point we don't have any action to perform.  How to set this change request as rejected. 

 

Thanks,

Raghu

entry.title: Re: SAP Integration Suite - How to execute POST using OData Adapter?
entry.content: As suggested by Pavan, " As an alternative you can try creating a simple mapping using generated edmx file in the target structure to post data. " Perform this. and the issue gets resolved. Since the payload we are sending the the payload IBP is expecting is different. But EDMX file will help us to create the target structure through mapping. And I am able to send the payload to IBP.

entry.title: Re: F5104, Intercompany billing EDI
entry.content: For which version of SAP : ECC, EHP, S/4HANA, cloud - public - private ?

entry.title: DVM Cloud App values vs DBACOCKPIT (HANA DB Memory Usage)
entry.content:
Hello SAP community,

We are trying to figure out how does DVM Cloud Application on launchpad (me.sap.com) calculates HANA Memory Usage (GB).

In DBACOCKPIT on the system, we can see:

Memory used/Allocation Limit (MDC), which should be the whole memory used for the HANA system - 357,22GB.

DVM Cloud Application shows Hana Memory Usage (GB):

Used - 583GB. How is this number calculated? 

Free - 369GB. How is this number calculated? 

We can see that Fast Rest Memory + Memory Used (tenant) = 349GB + some memory for overhead processes = Total Memory used in DBACOCKPIT. 

If the DVM Cloud App shows 583GB MEMORY USED, my guess is, it is showing also part of the persistance layer (data on disk). Basically it is Memory Used by HANA system - 357.22GB + (disk) ? If so, why is it called "HANA Memory Usage (GB)" ? .. 

If we take a look at the disk usage in dbacockpit:

Data Volume Size - 536,56GB

and compare it with DVM Cloud App:

Used 431 GB .. Fragmented 106 GB .. = 431 + 106 = 537 which is roughly the same as values from DBACOCKPIT.

If we check disk usage by executing SQL command SELECT * FROM M_DISK_USAGE;

USED_SIZE DATA is roughly the same as HANA Memory Usage in Cloud APP (the execution of the command was few days later).

 

USAGE_TYPEUSED_SIZEFILE_SIZE
CATALOG_BACKUP20,48020,480
DATA568,485,437,440568,479,186,944
DATA_BACKUP-1-1
LOG61,204,643,84061,204,643,840
LOG_BACKUP20,48020,480
ROOTKEY_BACKUP-1-1
TRACE498,139,136461,623,547

Best Regards

entry.title: Re: F5104, Intercompany billing EDI
entry.content: sorry, S/4HANA on premise

entry.title: Re: F5104, Intercompany billing EDI
entry.content:
Hello,

The message seems to be quite straightforward - check if the supplier mentioned in the error is created in the company code in which you post the invoice. 

Best regards

entry.title: Re: Inside SAP's Own Procurement Transformation with SAP Ariba Category Management
entry.content: Good one @LisaHeinrich 👍 Thanks for sharing this. When the chef eats his own cooking, you know the recipe is worth it 😀

entry.title: Re: IC Charging between Cost Centers with different currencies using SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
@Mathias_Venker 

Got it, Also for the first check may be its more dynamic to just test if charging cc and charged cc have common LC

IF [d/CostCenter].[p/currency] =  [d/P_CostCenter].[p/Curr]  THEN

DATA([d/Account] = "IC_CHARGES_IN", [d/CostCenter] = [d/P_CostCenter].[p/ID], [d/P_CostCenter] = [d/CostCenter].[p/ID]) = RESULTLOOKUP()

ENDIF

Nikhil

entry.title: Identity Authentication Activation in Build Work Zone for SAP Joule (SUFA)
entry.content:
Hi together,
to activate SAP Joule in SuccessFactors (SUFA) as described in the Discovery Center mission, I need to enable Identity Authentication in SAP Build Work Zone. Unfortunately, I'm currently blocked due to access and configuration issues.

Here’s what has happened so far:

  • The SuccessFactors instance is successfully connected in a separate BTP Global Account.

  • I’ve subscribed to SAP Build Work Zone in my BTP Subaccount.

  • The trust to the IAS tenant is set up and active.

  • I manually created my user in IAS (with the same email address), but in the BTP cockpit, a second user appears – still without access to the “Identity Authentication” tab in Work Zone.

  • An admin account with access to the tenant also doesn’t see the necessary tab.

  • “Create Shadow Users During Logon” is enabled in the trust configuration.

I suspect that either the original service subscriber is not correctly linked in IAS, or there’s a mapping issue between users and the IAS setup.

Here’s the mission I’m working on:
https://discovery-center.cloud.sap/protected/index.html#/mymissiondetail/152454/card/11573701/?tab=projectboard

I’d appreciate support or a recommended workaround to proceed with the activation.

Thanks and best regards,
Lucas Maier

entry.title: Re: CMS components extending SimpleCMSComponent are showi...
entry.content:
Hi @Harish_Vatsa 

It would be good to see the behaviour of the system in action (as always), but I have the feeling that it might be a sync issue. SmartEdit relies on the staged and online catalog versions. Therefore, ensure that the components are properly synchronised. Did you try to manually synchronizing the affected components from Backoffice (Catalog > Synchronization)?

If that is not the root cause for your issue, it can be also related to authorisations. SmartEdit has specific visibility rules. Even if the component is active in Backoffice, it may not appear in SmartEdit if it lacks certain permissions. Check the user roles and permissions for the SmartEdit user (especially for CMS components).

Finally, consider checking the console in your browser for any Javascript related errors. With that regard also consider to clear the browser cache and refresh the page.

 

I hope one of my thoughts points you in the right direction.

entry.title: Re: Log changes in Qunats
entry.content: The question is about LE-WM, not EWM and about quant changes, not product changes.

entry.title: Re: Log changes in Qunats
entry.content: There is no user exit for that. You would need to enhance the standard function.

I'm facing a problem with the "accept deviation" button in sales sumaries tab, it does not update the sales summary status, when clicking it nothing happens, it should change the status from deviation to accepted deviation. Please see my picture.

I appreciate any reply.

Thank you

 

Kind regards

Jhon Sebastián.

the supplier mentioned in the error is exactly the same as the G/L-account in OBCB. 

OBCB

entry.title: Re: Can sqlViewName of CDS view be renamed?
entry.content: This + DDIF_OBJECT_DELETE to delete the SQL view that had been automatically created

entry.title: Re: Permission "Manage Compensation Plan" missing & No ch...
entry.content:
I found the solution myself. I needed to add the permissions to create form templates from "Manage Form Templates". After getting the permission it worked for me.

 

I am still a little bit confused why VarPay worked out but Comp did not

entry.title: Announcement: Removal of Belize Theme of SAP Fiori
entry.content:
Executive summary

  • Automatic move to Horizon theme in SAP Fiori
  • Action is needed for custom themes based on Belize.

Themes in SAP Fiori

SAP Fiori is a design system that provides a consistent user experience for SAP software across platforms and devices. It is at the core of SAP’s product experience and design strategy. An essential element defining many aspects of the visual design is the theme. The latest Horizon theme is an evolution of the SAP Fiori design system and offers a modern, fresh look, and an improved user experience helping users to focus on their daily work. 

Belize theme removal

A previous version of Horizon is the Belize theme, introduced with SAP Fiori 2.0. Belize is deprecated as of SAPUI5 1.120 (see Deprecated Themes and Libraries) and SAP recommends to move to the current Horizon theme.

 

Existing usages of Belize will be automatically redirected to the Horizon theme.
With SAPUI5/OpenUI5 1.136 the UI5 controls will not work any longer with the Belize theme.

For more details on Belize in SAP S/4HANA and other products, please see Upcoming Removal of SAP Fiori themes Belize and Blue Crystal from @ThomasReiss. Other UI technologies are affected in the same way:

  • Web Dynpro ABAP: SAP_UI 8.16 & SAP_BASIS 9.16
  • SAP GUI for HTML: SAP Kernel 9.16 used in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition 2025 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2508
  • WebClient UI: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition 2025 and SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2508

With this focus on the Horizon theme SAP can deliver innovations faster. Also, runtime performance is expected to gain from a smaller CSS payload.

Custom themes based on Belize

Using the UI theme designer customers can apply their own branding by adapting a standard SAP Fiori theme: Customers may replace the logo or change the main branding colors of the UI by replacing the default brand and base colors of the theme. When creating a custom theme, an SAP standard theme (such as Morning Horizon) is selected as base theme.

Existing custom themes based on Belize need to be migrated before a mentioned UI technology version is used. Details on this migration are given in Migrate Your Themes with Ease and SAP Help: Migrating Themes on SAP BTP, Cloud Foundry environment.

entry.title: Upcoming Removal of SAP Fiori Themes Belize and Blue Crystal
entry.content:
The SAP Fiori visual themes Belize and Blue Crystal have been deprecated for many years. Now the time has come to optimize our UI technology by removing these themes. We plan to remove them in the next releases of products which allow users to choose multiple themes, such as SAP S/4HANA Cloud and SAP S/4HANA (on-premise) and SAP Integrated Business Planning.

Over the years SAP Fiori has evolved, introducing new visual themes along the way – most recently the Horizon theme. The Horizon theme not only looks modern and appealing, it also provides the highest level of support for accessibility, as well as the most flexibility for customers to create their own custom themes.

Horizon is the visual theme used by all our products in the SAP Business Suite. Figures 1 – 3 below show some examples of Horizon in our products.

We strongly recommend that all users use the Horizon theme to ensure an optimal and consistent user experience.

 

Removal of Belize and Blue Crystal

The visual themes Belize and Blue Crystal will be removed from SAP products with their next releases, starting in the second half of 2025. This means that the upcoming releases of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition and SAP Integrated Business Planning, as well as further products which currently include one or both of these themes, will no longer provide them as options.

After upgrading, existing usages of Belize or Blue Crystal will be automatically redirected to the Horizon theme.

If you have created your own custom theme based on Belize or Blue Crystal using the UI theme designer, you will need to migrate this to an available theme. Our strong recommendation is to base the new version on the Horizon theme.

For more information about the UI technologies affected, and how to migrate custom themes, have a look at this blog post by Oliver Graeff:

  • Announcement: Removal of Belize theme of SAP Fiori.

Additional Information for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

Important: If you use a custom theme and have set up the UI Theme Designer connection to your SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition with a communication arrangement on SAP Business Technology Platform Neo, make sure to move it to Cloud Foundry before you upgrade. Otherwise the automatic redirect to Horizon will not work. Also, future innovations will require the communication arrangement to use Cloud Foundry, so doing this move makes sense anyway. Here is a link to the documentation for this:

  • Integrating UI Theme Designer – SAP BTP Cloud Foundry Environment.

 

Examples of SAP Fiori visual theme Horizon

You can see some examples for Horizon in figures 1 – 3: for SAP Start and SAP Mobile Start, for SAP S/4HANA Cloud (the images show SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502) and SAP SuccessFactors. For further examples, have a look at these blog posts:

  • SAP Fiori Update: More Products with Horizon, Entry Point strategy, UX news for SAP S/4HANA and More.
  • SAP User Experience Update: Yet More Products with the New Look driven by SAP Fiori.
  • Improvements Coming to the Horizon Visual Theme for SAP Fiori.
  • SAP UX Innovations in Public Cloud Products, Joule, AI, Entry Points, Apple Vision Pro and more.
  • SAP UX Latest 2024 Innovations in Public Cloud: Joule, GenAI and More.
  • SAP User Experience Q1/2025 Update – Part 1: Many New Innovations Available (AI, Joule and More) – along with parts 2 – 7 which are linked therein.

Figure 1: The SAP Fiori visual theme Horizon for SAP Start and SAP Mobile Start. ALT Text: the image shows a screenshot of SAP Start with the Horizon theme, three iPhones with Horizon (one dark and one light showing SAP Mobile start, one showing an iPhone start screen with a notification from SAP Mobile STart ), and an Apple Watch with a notification from SAP Mobile Start and Horizon.

Figure 2: The SAP Fiori visual theme Horizon for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. ALT Text: an image showing two sceens with Morning Horizon (the My Home page and Monitor Purchase Order Items analytical list page) and two screens with the same apps with Evening Horizon, plus the text “Also available for accessibility: high contrast light and dark themes”.

Figure 3: Examples of SAP SuccessFactors applications with the SAP Fiori visual theme Horizon. ALT Text: Three examples showing both web and mobile: on the left the Home Page, in the middle Team Goals, on the right Opportunity Marketplace showing many cards, each displaying an opportunity.

To find out more about the Horizon theme, have a look at the SAP Fiori for web design guidelines:

  • Theming.

entry.title: Re: F5104, Intercompany billing EDI
entry.content:
Have you checked the vendor number in the IDOC? Most probably, some steps in customizing are incorrect. 

What number do you have in KNVV-EIKTO field in the customer master data?

entry.title: How can we easily calculate how much the parameter value for abap/heap_area_dia can be set to?
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community members,

How can we easily calculate how much the parameter value for abap/heap_area_dia can be set to? Also does this have impact on how much the "dia", "non-dia" and total values need to be set?

Regards

entry.title: Related Request for Change (ChaRm UI field) not appearing in search criteria but available in View
entry.content:
Hi All,

As we checked, Related Request for Change (ChaRm UI field) not appearing in search criteria but available in View section. Please find screenshot below.

Related request for change field is not available under search criteria's all available fields. Please find screenshot below.

We also checked in ChaRM CRM UI settings. Field ( Related Request for Change) itself is not available under field configuration. Thus, Search-relevance can not be made as search & result list type field.

Regards, 
Parag 

#SOLMAN Change Control Management   @Richard_Büffing

entry.title: Re: Step-by-Step Guide to SOAP Integration in SAP CPI
entry.content: nice job Abhishek, well explained and detailed 🙌

entry.title: Encapsulation of Crystal Reports 8.5 library in Windows service
entry.content: Good morning, we are currently still looking for a reporter to migrate to Crystal 8.5, we are waiting for authorization to migrate to a more current version of Crystal, but at the moment we are having a problem and that is because we have an application that uses this version of the reporter that runs at x64 bits, we had to encapsulate the Crystal Reports 8.5 library in a Windows service, without the viewer, that is, we only generate the pdf through the service and the Crystal library and then with a pdf viewer we show it, to avoid using the viewer, now the doubt that arises due to an inconvenience that we are presenting is that sometimes when doing the . cr.OpenReport(strRpt, CRAXDRT.CROpenReportMethod.crOpenReportByTempCopy) the service falls, I think but I'm not sure and I would like to ask you if this encapsulation needs to take something into account since I suspect that when making that .openReport it seems that the dll tries to use the gui

entry.title: Re: F5104, Intercompany billing EDI
entry.content:
Hello Stanislaw, thanks for your quick answer. The Idoc mentioned the correct supplier number in E1EDKA1 RS. And KNVV-EIKTO got the correct number.

Any other ideas? Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Couldn"t find transport requests in BW bridge (Eclipse)
entry.content:
When connecting via Eclipse to ECC and BW (through the BW Bridge), I am unable to locate any Transport Requests specifically for the BW Bridge. However, transport requests for ECC are visible under the Transport Organizer within BW Bridge. This issue is critical, as I need visibility into BW Bridge transport requests for effective development and management.

Required Assistance:
Please help clarify or modify the Eclipse configuration to ensure BW Bridge transport requests are visible within the Transport Organizer.

Greg

entry.title: ‌🇧🇷‌ Onsite Workshop: Discover How SAP Solutions Can Contribute To Tax Governance
entry.content:
Join us for an insightful meeting organized by Cast, BDO, and SAP! This event promises to be a valuable opportunity for professionals interested in enhancing their understanding of tax governance through innovative SAP solutions. Attendees will gain insights from industry experts and have the opportunity to network with peers who are equally passionate about leveraging technology for better tax management.

We look forward to welcoming you to the SAP Business Campus in São Paulo!

The event will be conducted in Portuguese.

REGISTER HERE

entry.title: Purchase Account Management Activation in Public cloud
entry.content:
Client is having a requirement to activate Purchase Account Management for reporting purposes but we are not able to find the option to  activate it.

 The BC Activity is available in ECC under MM as Purchase Account Management.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Purchase Account Management Activation in Public cloud
entry.content:
BC activity path is Accounting->Inventory accounting->'Activate Purchase  account in company code'

 SSCUI ID:106961

entry.title: Re: sending FI and AR relevant data to collections?
entry.content: For every new company you will always have to run first an initial transfer. Because to be able run this periodically you must have run first an initial transfer. SAP keeps track in a table of the companies for which you have run this initial transfer.

entry.title: How to manage material consumption from alternative locations in SAP PP?
entry.content:
Hello!

We are in the process of implementing the SAP PP module in our company, and we’ve encountered an issue related to managing materials across different storage locations. We manufacture a configurable semi-finished product, and depending on its size, the material needs to be consumed from different locations. However, the material code is the same, and we can’t define consumption from two different locations in the Bill of Materials (BOM).

The challenge we are facing is that we need the system to consume material from a primary location, but if there is no stock available in that location, it should consume from an alternative location without manual intervention.PP

Has anyone had experience configuring this in SAP PP? What solutions or approaches have you used to manage material consumption from alternative locations in the system? Any advice or recommendations would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in advance for your help.

entry.title: Re: Upcoming Removal of SAP Fiori Themes Belize and Blue Crystal
entry.content: Hi Thomas, very informative blog and nice update on the visual theme. Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Rehire with SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding: From Exit to Re-entry
entry.content:
This is wonderful, thanks for putting together. Do you have more details you could share on rehire within 3 years and the I-9 process and how it works in SAP SuccessFactors? I found this KBA 2773723 - I9 Reverification - Completing Section 3, Reverification and Rehires - Onboarding but when trying to test this and confirm how it works Section 3 does not show up in the Onboarding Dashboard. And if you complete a new I-9 which is what seems to be presented to the rehire and corp rep it does not trigger E-verify again. 

If you have experience with this and more clarity on the process in SuccessFactors that would be amazing. Reading the the USCIS gives us the rules but the gap is exact steps to do this in SuccessFactors Onboarding.  Completing Supplement B, Reverification and Rehires (formerly Section 3) | USCIS

Thanks!!

entry.title: Re: F5104, Intercompany billing EDI
entry.content: Apart from the suggestions already given, ensure, the vendor number in the IDoc is not the same as G/L Account which could also cause this issue. Also, ensure the vendor is properly maintained and extended to the company code for which, system triggered the error message

Nice explanation. Do we need to configure URL in target mapping in all environments manually?

entry.title: Loss on sale line is missing in assets retirement f-92
entry.content:
Hi,

Pls help, Loss on sale line is missing. my FY is 24-25 acquisition date is 1st April and after 2 month deprecation, selling first of June.

it's auto calculating in Dr sale of assets instead of separate line "loss on sale.

Determination Balance sheet and Deprecation & f-92 screenshot FYI

Thanks

Ved Prakash

entry.title: Re: Archived PO impossible to delete
entry.content:
Did you (or your basis team) manually delete the archive files and now you want to clean the Archive Indexes (accessible via Archive Explorer - Code SARE) that are still pointing to the PO?

If that's the case, go to TCode SARI -> Status -> 'MM_EKKO' and click Status Per Archive, then select the archive session(s) where the files got deleted and click "Delete structure" (background mode recommended).

entry.title: I have run cj88 with no errors for a project with actual costs but no change has been made .
Re: Sample File Link on Detail Screen - Agent Performance Management
entry.content: Which detail screen? So detail screens are at. a record level, so if you add a sample file to a detail screen it would be for a specific broker/customer etc.

entry.title: Re: Italy edocument - eInvoice with Partner solution - EDOC_ADAPTOR~SET_OUTPUT_DATA
entry.content: Hello, how did you solve the issue?

entry.title: Re: SAP Advantage ODBC drivers
entry.content: Hi Leiroa, i am looking for drivers for advantage 12.0

entry.title: How to contact Fieldglass Support
entry.content:
To get support for SAP Fieldglass, access  SAP Fieldglass Help Center  here  .  

The next step is to select one of the four roles from  Worker, Supplier, Buyer, or PMO.  

From here follow the below steps  

  1. Go to Fieldglass Help Center  
  2. Choose a role that describes them 

 3. Choose a role that describes them 

 4. Locate the tab ‘Contact Us’ 

 5. Enter search terms related to their query 

 6. Check the results for recommended solutions & answers 

 7. Click the option “Something Else” if they can’t find what they are looking for 

 

 

 8. Click “Create a Case” 

 9. Fill in the case details 

 10. Click to submit the case 

Choose a support channel to submit the case. The channel can be either email or phone.  

Please be advised that phone support is available in English only. 

Following submission, case visibility and case update is available through the contact us tab.  

You will be able to see your opened cases provide an update or request a follow up by email or phone. Follow ups that you have provided through the Fieldglass Help Center would be listed under the "Follow Up" Tab. 

 

If still unsure of the process, please see https://video.sap.com/media/t/1_oi1ryvmu. This is a step by step that will assist (How-to video (40sec, no audio) . 

 S-User ID? 

SAP Fieldglass - For technical assistance 

With a valid S-user ID with the correct authorizations assigned, please create a case via the SAP for Me portal. 

If you do not have an S-user ID and you are a Worker, Supplier, Buyer, or a PMO user you can receive technical assistance via the Fieldglass Help Center as mentioned above. 

  • 1296527 - How to create a support case for SAP Support - SAP for Me 
  • 3367715 - Changes to SAP Fieldglass phone and email support channels 

Furthermore, please find below this link which you may find helpful: 

Business End User SAP Fieldglass 

Thanks for reading!

entry.title: Re: Audit for identify login method changes (Employee Cen...
entry.content:
Hi @Elizabeta , hope you're doing good.

According to below KBA, you're able to run an Audit report to get the information you're looking for:

2744431 - How to Create Change Audit Reports and What Reports are Available - SuccessFactors

  • Is it possible to get report on user account changes? (Login Name, Login Method...)

    • You can now run change audit reports to track user account changes, including changes to account status, login name, login method, locale, time zone, account type, global user ID, and person UUID.

    • See details in the Help Guide - Change Audit Reporting for User Account Management

Please check it and see if can help you with your need, and in case it helped, please mark as a solution so others sharing the same doubt might also find this information.

Regards.

Thiago Eva

entry.title: Re: Manufacturing in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502
entry.content: Thank you

entry.title: Re: SAC - currency conversion across three currencies
entry.content: Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Different Logo/Branding across SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hi @kpavlovic , hope you're doing fine.

About your questions:

  • Logo and Banners can be configured in, considering the prerequisites from below page:
    • Choosing How Employees Match to Themes
  • Different logo in emails is a current limitation, according to below kba:
    • 2932543 - Is it possible to set different company logos in email notification for different subsidiaries?
  • RCM advertising for different brands seems to be related with RMK implementation and configuration
    • 2629356 - Jobs of Specific Brands not Posted on External Career Site - Recruiting Marketing

Hope above information can help you. In case it helps, please consider mark it as a solution, since it can help others with the same questions.

Regards.

Thiago Eva

entry.title: Re: Future of SAP Landscape Management
entry.content:

could anybody please answer this simple question of Tobias without usage of an hyperlink.

How do the System Data of OnPremise Systems flow to SAP Support Portal if there ist no LMDB/SLD anymore?

Thank you very much.

entry.title: Re: BDLS Conversion required in other productive systems...
entry.content:
If the ECC is migrated to S/4HANA (BROWNFIELD method), the SID will be the same, so no change is needed.

Otherwise, if your choice is to implement a S4 from scratch (GREENFIELD) or selective data migration (BLUEFIELD), then a new SID is mandatory and then you need to create new connections on all dependent systems.

NEVER do a BDLS conversion on a PRODUCTIVE SYSTEM! It's prohibited by SAP.

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Work Zone - Transport Route
entry.content: Hi @krishma_bhatia16 :  Hope you have created an instance of BWZ and then create the service key.

entry.title: Re: additional Application Server
entry.content:
The log mention a "permission denied" message on accessing the DEFAULT.PFL file.

Please check if the user running the INSTALLER (root?!) can write on the SAPMNT... could also be a mount issue (mounted or shared read-only).

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Work Zone - Transport Route
entry.content: Hi @Divya_Vellingiri : that should be ok if you are not using the Basic Authentication.

entry.title: Re: Determine Partner from one Bill To party to Multiple...
entry.content:
Hi Victor, You understood correct. @GauthierVictor 

Question: It seems there may be a bit of context missing from your description—are you using a multiple customer scenario (e.g. 0S02)? And are your condition records maintained at the Sold-To level with different rebate rates?

Answer: Yes i'm talking of multi-Payee 0S02 condition contract for rebate and i'm maintaining condition records with Sold to Parties in the condition contract, the sold to parties are maintained in Business volume criteria. System is creating Settlement documents with same bill to party but all the settlement documents considering only one condition record of one sold to party instead of considering condition record of each sold to party maintained in the condition records of CCM. (Scenario- One bill party assigned to Multiple Sold To Parties)

Can you please suggest ways to determine each sold to party from the same bill to party so that condition records of each sold to party is determined.

entry.title: Re: Handling OData Pagination in SAP AppGyver
entry.content: Hi @Murali_Shanmu Very clear and useful. Thanks. Unless mistaken, I don't think you have explained how to hide the NEXT button when viewing the last set of records...

entry.title: Re: Same Wage Type maintained IT15 for a month should not be summarized
entry.content: creating new WTs seems to be one solution. is there still nothing in 2025 for it? I also would like to have the same wt from it15 entered twice to be on the payslip as two separate entries maybe even with dates from it15. Maybe it could be created using Pe51 rule? Not sure yet!

entry.title: Re: Why the expiry date of SF "Certified Professional" in...

entry.title: Re: Why the expiry date of SF "Certified Professional" in...
entry.content: Hi @Margit_Wagner, I'm having the same issue and it's appearing now as expired. I opened this ticket 15 days ago 5000122451. Could you please help checking this? Thanks!

entry.title: SAP JMS adapter behavior ,post SAP PO7.5 restart
entry.content:
Our flow is SAP ECC(Proxy)->SAP PO(jms adapter)-Load balancer(DC1 and DC2)->Web Methods

SAP PO restart is done for maintenance activities.

once we restart ,the load is not distributing between DC1 and DC2 evenly in Load balancer.

For eg 90 percent of the messages are landing in Dc1 and only 10 percent to DC2.

We had to restart SAP PO server multiple times to balance the load distribution.

Is there any note to be implemented in SAP PO to stop multiple SAP PO restarts

entry.title: CR reports cannot connect to SQL Server database
entry.content: All of our reports connect to our FosterTrak database via SQL Server and this has been fine for years but today none of our reports can connect (see image).  How do I fix this?

entry.title: Re: Deployment Error In SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content: facing same issue. Deployment request timeout

entry.title: Re: Handling OData Pagination in SAP AppGyver
entry.content:
@Murali_Shanmu According to your example, I added the following formula to the visible property of the next button:

NOT(IS_EQUAL(appVars.pageNumber, CEIL(appVars.recordCount/10)))

or

NOT(IS_EQUAL(appVars.pageNumber, CEIL(DIVIDE(appVars.recordCount,10))))

It seems to be working.

entry.title: Re: Mass creation & upload freight agreements b SAP Publi...
entry.content:
Hi @BartBl,

In the Manage Freight Agreement app, you can upload and download rates through a spreadsheet: Rate Upload and Download Using Microsoft Excel

Additionally, you can also explore the use of an API. For example, Freight Agreement (A2X).

In case that you would like to request a feature, please follow the SAP KBA 2676589 - How to Submit Feature Request for Data Migration, SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

Hope this helps.

Arturo Montes de Oca

entry.title: Re: Número de afiliación IMSS y CURP duplicado en el empl...
entry.content:
Hola,

para lo que necesitas no te sirve el empleado concurrente, porque para CE deben tener la misma periodicidad las nominas, en tu caso te serviria Global employment en donde sei puedes tener diferentes sociedades y periodicidades, sin embargo para tu objetivo es mas sencillo que ligues el numero de personal de la otra sociedad en el IT0031, ello te permitira tener el mismo CURP y mismo numero de Seguridad social sin necesidad de hacer algo mas.

Gerardo Bailón Uriarte.

entry.title: Re: Integrating with the Alerts System API in SAP Service Cloud V2
entry.content: Would also like to know which Icons are available.

entry.title: Re: Handling OData Pagination in SAP AppGyver
entry.content: @Murali_Shanmu I spoke too soon, sorry. You did explained how to hide the next button when viewing the last page... Somehow, I missed that part;)

entry.title: How to use custom LLM end-points with SAP Generative AI Hub ?
entry.content:
My company has already contracts with AWS and Google and we have our own secured End-Points to interact with Gemini and Bedrock LLMs.
We would like to use SAP Generative AI Hub together with our own LLM end-points instead of using the ones provided by SAP.
Is there a way to do it ? I thought about deploying in AI Core a dummy LLM that would act as proxy to calls our own end-points. Any suggestion, code sharing are welcome.

entry.title: Re: Change Background color of field Based it's value cha...
entry.content:
Hello,
In this case, you can use screen validation rules. Look for the topic "Font Color Rules" on the blog: Rules and Validations in SAP C4C

I hope this helps you.
Clóvis Müller

entry.title: How to load the Freight Order related Dates from S4HANA Cloud to SAC Table?
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

Here I appear with an issue in Logistics. When posting the order, we are entering the date in the Display freight order in Quality System for more reference check the fig1 in attached document. 

In Story development in SAC, we are encountering with the problem that all the date fields we have taken in CDS views is showing the empty value.

We want to know the correct CDS view to use in order to load the Freight Order related Dates from S4HANA Cloud to SAC model.

 

Here, I request you to provide from which CDS we could take this date field.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to load the Freight Order related Dates from S4HA...
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

To assist you further, here is a link to detailed information on available CDS Views for Transportation Management in SAP's Help Portal, specifically for Analytics, Charge Management, and Freight Order Management, which are generally available in the Public Cloud system.

CDS Views for Transportation Management | SAP Help Portal

I recommend reviewing this resource to see if any of the available CDS views can meet your business needs. If the specific views you require are crucial for your operations, I suggest submitting a feature request to SAP for their inclusion in future releases. Kindly refer to SAP Note ##2963059 - How to Submit Feature Requests for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Product.

Regarding the integration with SAC, I would recommend taking a look at the contents below:

Mechanism to bring your custom CDS view from S4HAN… - SAP Community 

Creating Custom CDS Views and Analytical Query - A… - SAP Community

 

I hope this helps!

Thank you and best regards,

SAP Support.

entry.title: Re: Número de afiliación IMSS y CURP duplicado en el empl...
entry.content: Tambien puedes darle un vistazo a la vista V_T5F99K2 con la opcion IMSSV aqui te permite modificar si el numero de IMSS duplicado genera un mensaje de error o de advertencia.

entry.title: Re: Can we set mandatory for attachments
entry.content:
You can try something like if(formId == 'BrokerDFI') <-BrokerDFI is the form name and is case sensitive

"do Entity edit stuff"

else return false

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content:
@AyeshaMirza I love your enthusiasm for SAP. Hopefully your taking courses at learning.sap.com. Please join Interest Groups | SAP Community.

Also, if you are interested in Become an Event Organizer | SAP Community maybe you'll inspire other students with your passion to learn.

Finally, please connect with folks who are tops in their fields: SAP Community Leaders Finder | SAP Community

 

Best of luck!

entry.title: Re: Permission "Manage Compensation Plan" missing & No ch...
entry.content: a bit of humor on April 1st : at least for once it's Comp that's not behaving as one would expect and not VarPay !

entry.title: Re: Process Order Not creating PMR in EWM 950
entry.content: Ajit, I have already maintained that value on my Production Scheduling Profile. I am also using a Process Order and not Production Order for my scenario.

entry.title: Bin capcity error for fixed bins product
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

In a Public cloud, We are having 2-fixed bins assignment concept for a product.

Requiremnt is- For a product-ABC, has two fixed bins XXX (Bin capacity - 25 EA ), YYY (Bin capacity - 15 EA). For the first bin 20 EA stock is filled, When we are trying to create new warehouse task for 15EA for the same product we are getting error as " no Putaway- max storage type qty exceeded".

Kindly, suggest what are configs iam missing in the storage type which i configured.

Pls find the below screenshots for your reference.

 

Kindly do the needful.

Thanks,
Saikumar

entry.title: Can't see your certifications? Complete your SAP Universal ID setup
entry.content:
Your SAP Universal ID might be missing a secondary email address. This additional email is required for account recovery purposes and to
manage your certifications effectively. Please add at least one additional email address by visiting the Universal ID account manager.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Can't see your certifications? Complete your SAP Univ...
entry.content:
In order to solve the issue, kindly follow the advises in the below KBA to add a secondary email address. This can be any email address, it's not necessary to have any S-User or P-User assigned to it. Please make sure to verify the email address. 

2882908 How to add an additional user or e-mail address to the SAP Universal ID (UID)

entry.title: 'Created Date' within the 'Captured 1:1 Meeting' (CPM) schema.
entry.content: I am working on generating a Story report based on the 'Created Date' within the 'Captured 1:1 Meeting' (CPM) schema. However, when a user has created multiple records, only one record per date is displayed. When I include the 'Meeting Notes' or "Meeting ID" field, all records start appearing. As per the requirement, I need to display only the 'Created Date' and the subject user ID. Could you please suggest a solution to resolve this issue?

entry.title: Re: What Is SAP Business Data Cloud? Benefits, Architecture & Use Cases
entry.content:
Hi Raja,

     Thanks for sharing its really helpful. The Business data cloud will not be part of BTP platform? its a separate platform?

entry.title: Re: SAP SARA WRITE to file. What file type is the file? A...
entry.content: ASC is fine. You don't need to inform ".txt" at the end.

entry.title: With the deprecation of the password sign on, what is the plan for impacted PM Delegation?
entry.content: The new feature PM Delegation requires admins to log in as our test users to test and see the delegation feature in action.  If we remove the ability to log in using the basic credentials for our test tenants due to the sunsetting of basic authentication, then how are we as admins supposed to test that PM delegation feature?

entry.title: SAP Datasphere News in March
entry.content:
Another quarter is in the books ✨

After the announcement of SAP Business Data Cloud we did not stop and delivered great new features in SAP Datasphere with both March releases. Learn more in my short top features video in March 2025 on YouTube 📺

In addition, explore the latest updates in our community news blogs.

Check out the new book about SAP BW modernization: Unlocking SAP BW: Evolution from Legacy to Cloud to learn about the different options for your SAP BW environment in combination with SAP Datasphere or SAP Business Data Cloud.

 

My top features in March

 

New Horizon UI-Theme

SAP Datasphere has adopted the SAP standard Horizon theme, which offers a modern and fresh look with a new vibrant color palette. The icons and user interface elements may have changed to adopt this modern design but functionalities of the software remain the same.

 

Metadata Object Versioning

Object versions have now been introduced for views, analytic models, data access controls, and local tables. New object versions are created automatically at the time of deployment. You can now

  • list the past versions of objects
  • open a past version in read-only mode in a new tab
  • download a past version to a CSN/JSON file
  • restore a past version to replace the current version

Be aware that the saving of an error-free restored version overwrites the current object. It is also important to understand that the versioning happens for the metadata of an object, not the data. 
➡️  More information.

 

GrandTotal for Calculated Measures

We provide a new function for calculated measures in the analytic model expression editor called GrandTotal. The function GrandTotal calculates the overall sum of a given measure and computes it independent of the current drill state. This function takes one argument – a measure, e.g., GrandTotal(Sales) which then aggregates the value of Sales.

 

Schedule Task Chains in Local Time Zone

You can now schedule tasks in your preferred region or location time zone next to UTC, which remains the default setting. The schedules will automatically adjust to reflect daylight saving time. This ensures accurate timing for task execution to synchronize with all shared global operations.
➡️  More information

 

Folder Navigation

We also made a small UX adjustment to the navigation behaviour around folders. When closing an object now, you will return to last open folder. So far when closing editors, the root folder was always displayed and now the data builder opens the last open folder.

 

 

Unlocking SAP BW: Evolving from Legacy to Cloud

This new book I have co-authored together with my colleagues Frank Riesner, Dominik Kurz and Deniz Osoy comes at a perfect time. SAP Business Data Cloud was announced just a few weeks ago and one of it’s components is SAP BW, cloud private edition.

Many customers of SAP BW are elaborating different options at the moment. This book is covering the basics of SAP Business Data Cloud and the new BW modernization journey for existing SAP BW customers. Learn about the different options for your SAP BW environment in combination with SAP Datasphere or SAP Business Data Cloud.

Unlocking SAP BW: Evolution from Legacy to Cloud

 

More blogs to check out 👇

  • New Intelligent Look Up Feature in SAP Datasphere
  • Understanding OAuth 2.0 Behavior in SAP Datasphere’s Generic OData Connection
  • Why SAP BDC for Consuming SAP Data via CDS Views and not Replicate in Non-SAP Platform
  • Event-Driven Data Integration from SAP Sales and Service Cloud V2 to SAP Datasphere (Part 2 of 2)
  • Event-Driven Data Integration from SAP Sales and Service Cloud V2 to SAP Datasphere (Part 1 of 2)
  • Dynamic Measure Filtering Using Input Fields in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC)
  • The Evolution of SAP Data & Analytics is Accelerating!
  • First look into SAP Datasphere's new version control functionality
  • From Vision to Reality: Celebrating Innovation with SAP BDCI
  • Comprehensive Overview: SCIM API for SAP Datasphere User Management
  • SAP Data & Analytics Strategy: Current insights and future prospects
  • The POWER of SAP Business Data Cloud with Existing Third-Party Investments
  • Analytics Evolution : From Traditional Business Content to SAP BDC Insight Apps
  • Unlock Your SAP BTP Potential: Transformative Benefits of Functional and Technical Assistance
  • SAP Business Data Cloud - FAQs
  • Three Reasons to Read the SAP Business Data Cloud E-Book

 

Find more information and related blog posts on the topic page for SAP Datasphere. You will find further product information on our Community with various subpages about Business Content, the SAP BW Bridge as well as content for Best Practices & Troubleshooting. Also check out the new support content for SAP Datasphere on SAP Help for troubleshooting and analysis guides, how-to guides, technical details, and more.

Find out how to unleash the power of your business data with SAP’s free learning content on SAP Datasphere. It’s designed to help you enrich your data projects, simplify the data landscape, and make the most out of your investment. Check out even more role-based learning resources and opportunities to get certified in one place on  SAP Learning site.

entry.title: Auto Warehouse task creation after Goods receipt is done in putaway
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

In Public cloud,

Kindly provide the process, How the warehouse task should create automatically after the Goods receipt is done as per the putaway Rules ( Fixed bins- Bin Capcity) .

Thanks,
Saikumar

entry.title: Re: New Review Order Progress - Multilevel View App
entry.content:
@Markus_Oertelt I know it's only been a month, but is there any word on when this will be available for private cloud?

We have a customer that could use this report now, and would like to manage expectations

entry.title: Re: SAP Champion 2025
entry.content: Congrats Manuel!

entry.title: Planning same material in same storage location with 2 different split valuation separately
entry.content:
Hello,

There is a use case wherein some split valuated materials are stored in 1 storage location. A material with 2 valuation types needs to be planned separately in same storage location. We cannot create 2 MRP areas in same storage location. Both valuation types have different reorder points. Has anyone worked on similar use case?

Thanks in advance.

regards,

Anupama K.
